facebook.content:
You see, it's not about waiting for God to bless your relationships, your finances, or your life. It's about you blessing God first. When you bless God, He becomes the source of your increase. You're not trying to get what you want from Him; you're giving what you have to Him.

Psalm 24:1 says, "The earth is the Lord's, and everything in it, the world and all who live in it." You're not the source of your provision; God is.

Psalm 24:1 says, "The earth is the Lord's, and everything in it, the world and all who live in it." You're not the source of your provision; God is.

#KingdomLiving #KingdomOfGod #SpiritualGrowth
facebook.pullQuote: You're not trying to get what you want from Him; you're giving what you have to Him.

instagram.content:
Marriage is not a merger of two broken people trying to fix each other. 

It's a union of two whole people, each bringing their own gifts and strengths to the table. 

As Scripture says, "Two are better than one; because they have a good reward for their labour." - Ecc 4:9

What areas of your marriage can be transformed by recognizing and celebrating each other's strengths?
instagram.cta: Watch the full teaching → Link in bio

tiktok.content: You're waiting on people, circumstances, or timing to make your marriage what you want it to be. But the power's not in them, it's in you. When the Word dwells richly in you, your marriage flourishes. - Colossians 3:16. Who's been waiting on something outside of themselves lately?
